Advent Altar of Sacrifice.name: Altar of Sacrifice
Advent Altar of Sacrifice.description: A rite of sacrifice is initiated on the planet, unleashing a powerful a psionic wave that does heavy damage to all ships and structures in this and adjacent gravity wells.

Advent Atmospheric Shield Dome.name: Atmospheric Shield Dome
Advent Atmospheric Shield Dome.description: Shield systems designed to contain a breathable atmosphere allow micro climates to be established around population centers, granting a degree of comfortable living even on airless barren worlds.

Advent Coalescence Sanctum.name: Coalescence Sanctum
Advent Coalescence Sanctum.description: Skilled groups of Advent matriarchs work as a coalescence that can interpret and shape the sea of ideas that forms the Unity, telepathically guiding the efforts of an entire planet.

Advent Crystal Enrichment Center.name: Crystal Enrichment Center
Advent Crystal Enrichment Center.description: This advanced facility applies exotic chemicals to nascent crystal formations in order to increase their growth rate and quality.

Advent Cynosural Reservoir.name: Cynosural Reservoir
Advent Cynosural Reservoir.description: Large scale telepathic receiver arrays linked to the natural crystal reserves of the planet grant the Unity a greater Focus capacity.

Advent Devotion Harvester.name: Devotion Harvester
Advent Devotion Harvester.description: This massive arcane infrastructure stretches into every city on the planet, harvesting the latent mental energy of large planetary populations.

Advent Empyrean City.name: Empyrean City
Advent Empyrean City.description: This monumental city is held aloft amongst the clouds by the will of the Unity, greatly increasing comfortable living space.

Advent Epitaph of the Lost.name: Epitaph of the Lost
Advent Epitaph of the Lost.description: Placed in the most lethal of the blasted radioactive wastelands the planet has to offer, this grandiose monument commemorates the lost souls of the dead, both past and future.

Advent Haven Dome.name: Haven Dome
Advent Haven Dome.description: Advanced shield generators are used to create large, pleasant living environments, increasing commerce income.

Advent Heathen Quarter.name: Heathen Quarter
Advent Heathen Quarter.description: A safe zone established on an Advent world to facilitate the supply and coordination of minor faction fleets in the name of the Unity.

Advent Hydrostatic Shield Dome.name: Hydrostatic Shield Dome
Advent Hydrostatic Shield Dome.description: Pressure resistant shield systems deployed to the sea floor allow the expansion of population centers below the surface of the water.

Advent Icon of Control.name: Icon of Control
Advent Icon of Control.description: An imposing symbol of control focuses the minds of the local population, strengthening Influence generation rate.

Advent Icon of Unity.name: Icon of Unity
Advent Icon of Unity.description: A grand symbol of the Unity focuses the minds of the local population, increasing Focus recharge rate.

Advent Icon of Revelation.name: Icon of Revelation
Advent Icon of Revelation.description: This symbol of knowledge focuses the collective consciousness of the planetary population on revelation, increasing research rate.

Advent Laminate Forge.name: Laminate Forge
Advent Laminate Forge.description: Crystal is cut and layered into precise sheets to create a tough, flexible and light substitute for metal in Advent construction and technology.

Advent Greater Temple of Pilgrimage.name: Greater Temple of Pilgrimage
Advent Greater Temple of Pilgrimage.description: This and adjacent gravity wells are imbued with the presence of the Unity. When they become cleared of hostile forces, your empire automatically colonizes the planet if possible. Planets colonized in this way receive a development track cost reduction as well.

Advent Neural Stimulator.name: Neural Stimulator
Advent Neural Stimulator.description: Psionic amplifiers deployed throughout the Hive asteroid forcefully agitate Vasari brains to generate a small amount of usable Focus from the otherwise psionically vacant minds of the aliens, driving them mad in the process.

Advent NeuroAugment Center.name: NeuroAugment Center
Advent NeuroAugment Center.description: This advanced medical center freely provides PsiTech cybernetics to Advent children and fresh converts to the Unity alike, allowing them to begin developing their psionic abilities.

Advent NeuroPsion Purifier.name: NeuroPsion Purifier
Advent NeuroPsion Purifier.description: Rare natural compounds can be processed into large amounts of the unique drug NeuroPsion, a mental stimulant that greatly augments psionic potential.

Advent Pelagic Interface Relay.name: Pelagic Interface Relay
Advent Pelagic Interface Relay.description: Monstrous creatures of the deep ocean are fitted with arcane cybernetics and connected to a telepathic adapter in order to harness their abyssal minds for the Unity.

Advent Planetary Shield Projector.name: Planetary Shield Projector
Advent Planetary Shield Projector.description: A surface based generator that utilizes defense infrastructure to project a planet-wide shield.

Advent Plasma Furnace.name: Plasma Furnace
Advent Plasma Furnace.description: Controlled application of plasma and magnetic fields provide the necessary conditions for the creation of advanced alloys and exotic materials.

Advent Plaza of Empathy.name: Plaza of Empathy
Advent Plaza of Empathy.description: This magnificent boulevard channels psionic energy to invoke a powerful sense of empathy in all its visitors, leading them to align with the Advent of their own free will.

Advent Prescience Filter.name: Prescience Filter
Advent Prescience Filter.description: A technological temple to purity, this grand edifice uses the unique properties of the geomagnetic planet to shield the true Unity from corruptive influences.

Advent PsiCredit Mint.name: PsiCredit Mint
Advent PsiCredit Mint.description: Credit tokens are collected from the citizens on planets embraced by the Advent, then reforged with psionically active crystal before being distributed again. The new tokens give even the least psionically active citizens a level of autonomy in Advent society.

Advent Radiation Shield Dome.name: Radiation Shield Dome
Advent Radiation Shield Dome.description: Radiation proof shield systems allow settlements to eschew the use of heavily insulated bunkers and develop much larger population centers.

Advent Greater Temple of Purification.name: Greater Temple of Purification
Advent Greater Temple of Purification.description: This and adjacent gravity wells are imbued with the presence of the Unity. When they become cleared of hostile forces, friendly units in that gravity well restore hull and shields over a short duration.

Advent Sanctuary Spire.name: Sanctuary Spire
Advent Sanctuary Spire.description: This self sufficient arcology provides considerable living space for Advent citizens no matter the planetary environment.

Advent School of Evangelists.name: School of Evangelists
Advent School of Evangelists.description: Zealous fanatics are indoctrinated here before being sent out to adjacent planets. When your empire establishes dominant culture there, damage over time is inflicted to the planet if it is hostile to your empire.

Advent Silent Monastery.name: Silent Monastery
Advent Silent Monastery.description: Silent Ones - those incapable of joining the Unity group mind are exiled to remote monasteries where they live a life of menial labor.

Advent Starlight Augury.name: Starlight Augury
Advent Starlight Augury.description: Advanced field manipulation technology allows the Advent to transform the geomagnetic planet into an immense signal amplifier. Primarily used to send the message of the Unity across space into the minds of the willing and unwilling alike, it sometimes also receives telepathic echoes, reaffirming the righteous purpose of the Unity.

Advent Shrine of Revelation.name: Shrine of Revelation
Advent Shrine of Revelation.description: Increases Harmony Research Points and research rate.

Advent Shrine of Harmony.name: Shrine of Harmony
Advent Shrine of Harmony.description: Increases Harmony Research Points and research rate.

Advent Shrine of Concordance.name: Shrine of Concordance
Advent Shrine of Concordance.description: Prescient adepts use the surging energies of the geomagnetic planet to focus their powers of revelation towards learning the secrets of ever more advanced technology.

Advent Shrine of Prophecy.name: Shrine of Prophecy
Advent Shrine of Prophecy.description: Increases Hostility Research Points and research rate.

Advent Shrine of Hostility.name: Shrine of Hostility
Advent Shrine of Hostility.description: Increases Hostility Research Points and research rate.

Advent Telepathic Relay.name: Telepathic Relay
Advent Telepathic Relay.description: Large PsiTech transmission arrays crewed by telepathic adepts facilitate the communication of complex thoughts across the vast distance between planets.

Advent Temple of Assimilation.name: Temple of Assimilation
Advent Temple of Assimilation.description: Powerful psionics stand ready to overpower encroaching enemy forces. When enemy ships enter the gravity well, they have a small chance to be converted into serving your empire.

Advent Temple of Pilgrimage.name: Temple of Pilgrimage
Advent Temple of Pilgrimage.description: This and adjacent gravity wells are imbued with the presence of the Unity. When they become cleared of hostile forces, your empire automatically colonizes the planet if possible. Planets colonized in this way receive a development track cost reduction as well.

Advent Temple of Purification.name: Temple of Purification
Advent Temple of Purification.description: This and adjacent gravity wells are imbued with the presence of the Unity. When they become cleared of hostile forces, friendly units in that gravity well restore hull and shields over a short duration.

Advent Temple of Resurrection.name: Temple of Resurrection
Advent Temple of Resurrection.description: Whenever your empire's corvettes, frigates, and cruisers are destroyed in orbit, they have a small chance to be resurrected.

Advent Thermal Shield Dome.name: Thermal Shield Dome
Advent Thermal Shield Dome.description: Shield systems designed to regulate thermal extremes allow settlements to be established without bulky insulation, freeing space to be used in supporting a larger population.

Advent Tithe Sanctum.name: Tithe Sanctum
Advent Tithe Sanctum.description: Material wealth deemed to be excess by the Advent is mandated to be delivered to this centralized point for repurposing.

Advent Tranquil Refuge.name: Tranquil Refuge
Advent Tranquil Refuge.description: This hardened shield dome provides a place of refuge for the population when the planet comes under attack, providing additional health and health regeneration.

Advent Unity Protectorate.name: Unity Protectorate
Advent Unity Protectorate.description: Bestows the sanctity of the Unity on friendly ships and structures in orbit, granting them a bonus to their maximum shields and psi power.

Aluxian Economic Advisors.name: Aluxian Economic Advisors
Aluxian Economic Advisors.description: Expert economists trained by the Aluxi Dynasty who act as advisors for a planetary government.

Aluxian Governor-Scion.name: Aluxian Governor-Scion
Aluxian Governor-Scion.description: The family members of the Aluxi Dynasty are expert governors, with skills honed over many generations.

Artifact Manifest Dominion.name: Manifest Dominion
Artifact Manifest Dominion.description: Holographic documents of unknown origin foretell your empire to become the galaxy's one true power. Culture spread rates are increased.

TEC Regional Government Office.name: Regional Government Office
TEC Regional Government Office.description: Administrative facilities for the regional department of your empire's government. Increases maximum allegiance and gives civilian orbit slots.

TEC Unassailable Fortress.name: Unassailable Fortress
TEC Unassailable Fortress.description: Pranast United's planetary fortifications of unmatched resilience. Provides a significant increase to planet health and Military slots.

Frontier Adaption Lab.name: Frontier Adaption Lab
Frontier Adaption Lab.description: Jiskun research focuses on pushing Vasari genetic adaptation technology to ever greater extremes.

Frontier Colony Uplink.name: Frontier Colony Uplink
Frontier Colony Uplink.description: An orbital uplink customized by the Jiskun Expeditionary Force to enable rapid development and protection of new colonies.

Artifact Matter Synthesizer.name: Matter Synthesizer
Artifact Matter Synthesizer.description: An atomic scale scanning and reordering system, it allows all manner of components to be efficiently constructed. Reduces the cost of all ships and structures produced in your empire.

Shrine of Euphoria.name: Shrine of Euphoria
Shrine of Euphoria.description: This massive, intricate device emanates waves of psionic energy that rapidly induce a heightened sense of joy in the planetary population.

Pirates! Smugglers' Den.name: Smugglers' Den
Pirates! Smugglers' Den.description: A large scale contraband handling network that can also act as base for pirates to launch raids from.

Unassailable Fortress.name: Unassailable Fortress
Unassailable Fortress.description: Pranast United's planetary fortifications of unmatched resilience. Provides a significant increase to planet health and Military slots.

Artifact Relativistic Factories.name: Relativistic Factories
Artifact Relativistic Factories.description: Uncovered factory designs allow ships and structures to be constructed in a relativistically accelerated frame of reference, making them build at a quicker rate.

Artifact Data Archive.name: Data Archive
Artifact Data Archive.description: An advanced storage and simulation engine, it facilitates the act of performing research, thus reducing research time.

Artifact Tachyon Comms Relay.name: Tachyon Comms Relay
Artifact Tachyon Comms Relay.description: Allows instantaneous communication with your fleets, improving your empire's ability to coordinate its forces. Grants a moderate bonus to maximum Fleet Supply.

TEC Alloy Foundry.name: Alloy Foundry
TEC Alloy Foundry.description: Foundry complexes use materials sourced from the trade network to provide additional metal Export capacity.

TEC Aquaculture Harvester.name: Aquaculture Harvester
TEC Aquaculture Harvester.description: Industrial scale harvesting of the vast reserve of fish and edible seaweed found on oceanic worlds allows the TEC to ensure the food supply for the planet.

TEC Archaeology Center.name: Archaeology Center
TEC Archaeology Center.description: A hub for survey teams to stage expeditions into the desert where they hope to find valuable items in the shifting sands.

TEC Experimental Economics Lab.name: Experimental Economics Lab
TEC Experimental Economics Lab.description: Establishes limited ground-based Civilian research facilities.

TEC Secret Weapons Lab.name: Secret Weapons Lab
TEC Secret Weapons Lab.description: Establishes limited ground-based Military research facilities.

TEC Auxiliary Supply Depot.name: Auxiliary Supply Depot
TEC Auxiliary Supply Depot.description: A spaceport and warehouse complex designed to distribute modular supply packages to the minor faction fleets in the employ of the TEC.

TEC Chemical Plant.name: Chemical Plant
TEC Chemical Plant.description: Specialized facilities harvest and process the rare chemical compounds found on primordial planets, improving commerce income rate and Exotic manufacturing speed at this planet.

TEC Command Bunker.name: Command Bunker
TEC Command Bunker.description: Constructs an underground command center to protect local military leadership from bombardment. Increases planet health and Military slots.

TEC Commercial District.name: Commercial District
TEC Commercial District.description: Improves commerce income rate from population.

TEC Commodity Exchange.name: Commodity Exchange
TEC Commodity Exchange.description: A market hub dedicated to generating profit transporting basic materials through the trade network, providing additional credit Export capacity.

TEC Synthetic Crystal Farm.name: Synthetic Crystal Farm
TEC Synthetic Crystal Farm.description: Large scale synthetic crystal growing operations are established using compounds sourced from the trade network in order to improve crystal Export capacity.

TEC Ferric Mining Rig.name: Ferric Mining Rig
TEC Ferric Mining Rig.description: Mining machinery heavily modified for the iron-rich substrate boosts metal mining rates.

TEC Fissile Enrichment Plant.name: Fissile Enrichment Plant
TEC Fissile Enrichment Plant.description: Specialized facilities enrich and stabilize the rare isotopes found on irradiated planets, improving metal income rate and Exotic manufacturing speed at this planet.

TEC Fulfillment Warehouse.name: Fulfillment Warehouse
TEC Fulfillment Warehouse.description: Provides additional Export points to the planet.

TEC Gas Crystalizer.name: Gas Crystalizer
TEC Gas Crystalizer.description: Further observations of Vasari resource collection inspired the TEC to design machines that convert gas harvesting byproducts into a periodic supply of highly prized Andvar.

TEC Gas Harvester.name: Gas Harvester
TEC Gas Harvester.description: Mimicking the Vasari, the TEC have learned to harvest valuable gases with these harvesters deployed at optimal points in the gas giant's atmosphere.

TEC Harvesting Crawler.name: Harvesting Crawler
TEC Harvesting Crawler.description: Mobile mining platforms designed to seek out high quality geodes in splintered terrain increase crystal mining rates.

TEC Ice Processing Facility.name: Ice Processing Facility
TEC Ice Processing Facility.description: Ice is selectively processed to extract usable crystal and rare, valuable frozen gases. Improves crystal mining income rates and Influence generation rates.

TEC Industrial District.name: Industrial District
TEC Industrial District.description: Subsystem manufacturing on the surface reduces the cost and build time of ships constructed in orbit.

TEC Garrison Recruitment Center.name: Garrison Recruitment Center
TEC Garrison Recruitment Center.description: Idle factories will produce garrison ships.

TEC Garrison Command.name: Garrison Command
TEC Garrison Command.description: The Enclave's goal of an isolated empire enclosed by a wall of impenetrable planets begins with Garrison Command, a dedicated force dutifully protecting your capital world while the empire solidifies its outer perimeter.

TEC Home Guard Command Center.name: Home Guard Command Center
TEC Home Guard Command Center.description: This heavily fortified facility acts as the command post for the Enclave Home Guard militia, whose members will be deployed on ships up to two jumps away. Their grit and damage control expertise ensure ships can shrug off extreme damage in combat.

TEC Home Guard Outpost.name: Home Guard Outpost
TEC Home Guard Outpost.description: This fortified facility acts as a barracks for the Enclave Home Guard militia, whose members will be deployed on ships up to one jump away. Their grit and damage control expertise ensure ships can shrug off extreme damage in combat.

TEC Media Conglomerate.name: Media Conglomerate
TEC Media Conglomerate.description: Improves Culture spread rate and grants a stacking bonus to maximum Influence for each owned Broadcast Center in orbit.

TEC Geothermal Smelter.name: Geothermal Smelter
TEC Geothermal Smelter.description: Many points of limited volcanic activity are leveraged to power large-scale metal smelters, improving metal mining income rates and reducing build time for ships constructed at this planet.

TEC Munitions Plant.name: Munitions Plant
TEC Munitions Plant.description: Grants a damage bonus to allied structures and starbases in orbit.

TEC High Pressure Domes.name: High Pressure Domes
TEC High Pressure Domes.description: A deep ocean dome to increase population and commerce income.

TEC Pirate Mercenary Base.name: Pirate Mercenary Base
TEC Pirate Mercenary Base.description: A covert meeting point where pirate mercenaries can be hired.

TEC Supreme Center for Human Doctrine.name: Supreme Center for Human Doctrine
TEC Supreme Center for Human Doctrine.description: This grand and imposing facility broadcasts human centric messages to ships at this planet and up to two jumps away. Invigorated and inspired by the continuous indoctrination, warship crews seek out battle with a renewed ruthlessness and improved effectiveness in combat.

TEC Center for Human Doctrine.name: Center for Human Doctrine
TEC Center for Human Doctrine.description: This imposing facility broadcasts human centric messages to ships at this planet and up to one jump away. Invigorated and inspired by the continuous indoctrination, warship crews seek out battle with a renewed ruthlessness and improved effectiveness in combat.

TEC Orbital Mining Control.name: Orbital Mining Control
TEC Orbital Mining Control.description: Advanced communication and monitoring equipment is installed in orbital mining rigs to improve efficiency. Increases income rate from metal and crystal extractors.

TEC Resort Complex.name: Resort Complex
TEC Resort Complex.description: Extensive high-class resorts are constructed on the most pristine beachfronts the oceanic world has to offer. These prestigious facilities cater to every desire no matter the cost, proving the influence of the TEC to all who visit.

TEC Xeno Emporium.name: Xeno Emporium
TEC Xeno Emporium.description: Although poor in resources, Hive asteroids have a vast wealth of technological marvels, unusual curios and wondrous objects that can be easily collected and exported.

TEC Applied Radioactives Lab.name: Applied Radioactives Lab
TEC Applied Radioactives Lab.description: Safely studying the many military and civilian applications of hard radiation requires an Indurium reinforced bunker to house TEC scientists and their sensitive equipment.

TEC Directed Energy Lab.name: Directed Energy Lab
TEC Directed Energy Lab.description: The unusual magnetic fields of the geomagnetic planet provide the ideal conditions for TEC scientists to conduct further research into the military applications of high energy particles.

TEC Xeno Tech Lab.name: Xeno Tech Lab
TEC Xeno Tech Lab.description: The advanced technology built into the very structure of the Hive asteroid is of great interest to TEC science and engineering teams.

Artifact Universal Terrarium.name: Universal Terrarium
Artifact Universal Terrarium.description: An advanced cultivation facility capable of spreading a hardy, adaptable ecology to any environment, no matter how inhospitable.

Vasari Alliance Consulate.name: Alliance Consulate
Vasari Alliance Consulate.description: A magnificent structure designed to host representatives of the many factions the Vasari Alliance wishes to incorporate into its growing coalition.

Vasari Alliance Xeno Embassy.name: Alliance Xeno Embassy
Vasari Alliance Xeno Embassy.description: A grand yet welcoming structure built to house legions of Vasari diplomatic experts and facilitate mutual cooperation between species.

Vasari Intercultural Exchange.name: Intercultural Exchange
Vasari Intercultural Exchange.description: Facilities dedicated to the exchange of ideas and goods are established, embracing the Alliance's strategy of cooperation.

Vasari Cloning Vats.name: Cloning Vats
Vasari Cloning Vats.description: Compared to the cramped and spartan conditions aboard Vasari ships, Hive Asteroids present a spacious and resource rich environment ideal for large scale cloning facilities.

Vasari Closed Cycle Exotic Refinery.name: Closed Cycle Exotic Refinery
Vasari Closed Cycle Exotic Refinery.description: The unique matter refinement systems built into the Hive Asteroid are designed to use, reuse and repurpose any and all materials at a molecular level. This allows the Hive Asteroid to act as an Exotic Refinery.

Vasari Compliance Inducer.name: Compliance Inducer
Vasari Compliance Inducer.description: The oppressive internal architecture of the Hive Asteroid is designed to amplify subsonic frequencies that break down mental resistance and focus in both Vasari and Humans.

Vasari Crystal Seeking Nanites.name: Crystal Seeking Nanites
Vasari Crystal Seeking Nanites.description: Nanites bred to detect crystal drill and burrow into the depths of the planet to locate and extract normally inaccessible crystal lodes.

Vasari Dark Fleet Tower.name: Dark Fleet Tower
Vasari Dark Fleet Tower.description: Summons an isolated portion of the Dark Fleet from deep space to a planet within range.

Vasari Debris Reclamation Center.name: Debris Reclamation Center
Vasari Debris Reclamation Center.description: The debris reclamation facility enables the automatic harvesting of resources from destroyed ships at this planet and all planets up to one jump away.

Vasari Deconstruction Nanites.name: Deconstruction Nanites
Vasari Deconstruction Nanites.description: Salvage nanites derived from attack strains are deployed to housing structures deemed superfluous to requirements in order to collect high quality metals for repurposing.

Vasari Defensive Uplink.name: Defensive Uplink
Vasari Defensive Uplink.description: Acts as a relatively secure point of coordination for all defensive orbital structures to increase range and damage.

Vasari Exodus Dark Fleet Tower.name: Exodus Dark Fleet Tower
Vasari Exodus Dark Fleet Tower.description: Summons an isolated portion of the Dark Fleet from deep space to a planet within range.

Vasari Exodus Debris Reclamation Center.name: Exodus Debris Reclamation Center
Vasari Exodus Debris Reclamation Center.description: This large scale debris reclamation facility enables the automatic harvesting of resources from destroyed ships at this planet and all planets up to two jumps away.

Vasari Exodus Overseer Tower.name: Exodus Overseer Tower
Vasari Exodus Overseer Tower.description: Summon a single Overseer from the Dark Fleet to any friendly planet.

Vasari Exodus Xeno Embassy.name: Exodus Xeno Embassy
Vasari Exodus Xeno Embassy.description: An imposing, sinister structure built to protect Vasari subversion experts and ensure the uninterrupted cooperation of lesser species.

Vasari Crystallizing Gas Refinery.name: Crystallizing Gas Refinery
Vasari Crystallizing Gas Refinery.description: Harvesters are suspended at key locations in the atmosphere to collect and purify valuable gases. Compact Vasari technology also allows for simultaneous refining of the byproducts into raw crystal.

Vasari Hygroscopic Nanites.name: Hygroscopic Nanites
Vasari Hygroscopic Nanites.description: Specialized nanites bred to aggressively locate and reclaim water are deployed in arid environments, providing vital hydration to population centers in the deep desert.

Vasari Indoctrination Center.name: Indoctrination Center
Vasari Indoctrination Center.description: Brainwashing and coercion techniques are deployed from this terrifying edifice to render the local population docile and secure the support of their leadership.

Vasari Industrial Nanoforge.name: Industrial Nanoforge
Vasari Industrial Nanoforge.description: Nanoforges dispersed throughout the internal structure of the Hive Asteroid can be repurposed towards the construction of components for Vasari ships being built in orbit.

Vasari Labor Camp.name: Labor Camp
Vasari Labor Camp.description: Unsubtle oppression is used to force able-bodied humans into assisting mining and construction.

Vasari Lava Scoop.name: Lava Scoop
Vasari Lava Scoop.description: This large gravity lift platform funnels metal rich lava from the planet surface into space where it can be cooled and harvested.

Vasari Metal Seeking Nanites.name: Metal Seeking Nanites
Vasari Metal Seeking Nanites.description: Nanites bred to detect metal drill and burrow into the depths of the planet to locate and extract normally inaccessible metal seams.

Vasari Nano Algae Reactors.name: Nano Algae Reactors
Vasari Nano Algae Reactors.description: Reactors with specialized nanites evolved to support algae growth are deployed to all major population centers. While not popular as a food source, it does sustain a much larger workforce.

Vasari Ocean Floor Miner.name: Ocean Floor Miner
Vasari Ocean Floor Miner.description: Massive mining equipment is deployed to violently strip mine large swathes of the ocean floor at the cost of degraded habitability.

Vasari Administrative Uplink.name: Administrative Uplink
Vasari Administrative Uplink.description: Coordinates surface operations with non-military orbital activities to increase civilian slots and orbital extraction rates.

Vasari Overseer Tower.name: Overseer Tower
Vasari Overseer Tower.description: Summon Overseers and supporting ships from the Dark Fleet to any friendly planet.

Vasari Matter Hypercompiler.name: Matter Hypercompiler
Vasari Matter Hypercompiler.description: Vasari resource management technology operates at a molecular level, purifying and concentrating resources to an extreme degree.

Vasari Stabilization Nanites.name: Stabilization Nanites
Vasari Stabilization Nanites.description: Specialized nanites are evolved to locate and stabilize potential fault lines in the delicate environments of crystalline worlds, allowing large settlements to be established around the most precious crystal nodes.

Vasari Core Stripper.name: Core Stripper
Vasari Core Stripper.description: Allows you to consume a planet once you abandon it, stripping it of all natural resources to generate a huge amount for your empire. The planet is permanently ruined.

Vasari Jitra Stasis Lab.name: Jitra Stasis Lab
Vasari Jitra Stasis Lab.description: Cold and harsh environments like those found on ice and desert planets are optimal for Vasari research into phase induced stasis, improving empire research.

Vasari Sevra Genetics Lab.name: Sevra Genetics Lab
Vasari Sevra Genetics Lab.description: The verdant environments of terran and oceanic planets create the ideal conditions for Vasari research into genetics, offering advances in empire research.

Vasari Sevistra Biology Lab.name: Sevistra Biology Lab
Vasari Sevistra Biology Lab.description: The extreme conditions of the irradiated planet provide an ideal crucible in which to test the resilience of genetic modifications. The most effective of these are immediately applied to the planetary population.

Vasari Vitra Weapons Lab.name: Vitra Weapons Lab
Vasari Vitra Weapons Lab.description: Vasari research into weaponizing the fundamental forces of the universe is more easily conducted in places that are actively hostile to life, like ferrous and volcanic worlds.

Vasari Kortra Gravity Lab.name: Kortra Gravity Lab
Vasari Kortra Gravity Lab.description: The unusual conditions found near gas giants provide ample opportunity for Vasari research into gravity-based weapons technology.

Vasari Lirtra Adjunct Lab.name: Lirtra Adjunct Lab
Vasari Lirtra Adjunct Lab.description: The essential Lirtestra and Viturska orbital labs are a primary target of the less advanced enemies. These surface extensions of the primary facilities help prevent disruptions to critical research.

Vasari Organic Reclamation Nanites.name: Organic Reclamation Nanites
Vasari Organic Reclamation Nanites.description: Advanced nanites bred to violently reclaim resources from organic matter are deployed to areas of terran planets that have been deemed unnecessary for industry, generating considerable resource income at the cost of habitability.

Vasari Xeno Settlement.name: Xeno Settlement
Vasari Xeno Settlement.description: Radical, free-thinking Vasari civilians, tired of living aboard starships, descend to form communities on planets thought to resemble the ancient Vasari homeworld.

Phase Crystallizer.name: Phase Crystallizer
Phase Crystallizer.description: A powerful planet item that will generate crystal using advanced phase-based technology.
